goals.description: Submit the graded assignment immediately to lock in the A before the timer hits zero.
goals.rationale: The outcome is binary: submission secures the grade; hesitation risks a penalty. My value system demands this academic win above all else. Hunger or fatigue are irrelevant variables now that I'm 90% done. I will push through the final minutes without complaint because the reward (the A) justifies the cost.

goals.description: Execute a rapid, efficient meal break with the cohort group to refuel and reset social standing before sleep.
goals.rationale: Once the grade is locked, the immediate need shifts from 'surviving' to 'recharging.' Eating quickly with the cohort isn't about deep connection right now; it's a tactical stop-gap to restore physical stamina for tomorrow's sprint. Skipping lunch entirely would be inefficient, but lingering here is a waste of time. I'll handle this in 30 minutes once the submission click is registered.

goals.description: Drop note tidying and file organization tasks until Friday.
goals.rationale: Zero marginal utility compared to securing that A. Mental clutter distracts from the hard work I need to do right now. The cohort doesn't care about organized folders; they care if I got the grade. Dropping this maintains focus on the outcome while I wait for the next priority window.
